rulings.Case Title: DAVID RHOADS VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 24, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Theodore T. Cordery's motion to be relieved as counsel for Rich-Tex, Inc. is continued on the court's own motion to June 14, 2017. = (503/CML)
